errors.INSTALLER_NOT_FOUND: BMad installer not found. Please run `npx bmad-method install` manually.
errors.INSTALLER_TIMEOUT: BMad installer timed out. Try again or run it manually.
errors.INSTALLER_ALREADY_RUNNING: An installer is already running for this project. Wait for it to finish or cancel it first.
errors.NPX_NOT_AVAILABLE: `npx` is not available on PATH. Install Node.js 20+ to continue.
errors.PROJECT_NOT_BMAD: This is not a BMad project. Run the install wizard to set it up.
errors.PROJECT_NOT_FOUND: Project not found at the given path.
errors.CSV_PARSE_ERROR: Could not parse a BMad CSV file: {{message}}
errors.TOML_PARSE_ERROR: Could not parse a TOML file: {{message}}
errors.YAML_PARSE_ERROR: Could not parse a YAML file: {{message}}
errors.SKILL_NOT_FOUND: Skill `{{skillId}}` is not installed in this project.
errors.STEP_FILE_NOT_FOUND: Step file is missing on disk: {{path}}
errors.STEP_LOAD_VIOLATION: Step files must be loaded one at a time. Refusing to pre-load.
errors.PATH_OUT_OF_PROJECT: The requested path is outside this BMad project.
errors.WATCHER_INIT_FAILED: Could not start the BMad file watcher: {{message}}
errors.WATCHER_NOT_RUNNING: The BMad file watcher is not running for this project.
errors.PROVIDER_ERROR: AI provider could not be initialized: {{message}}
errors.UNSUPPORTED_TRACK: This track isn't supported yet. Pick BMad Method or Enterprise.
errors.CYCLIC_VARIABLE: A variable in your config references itself in a loop: {{message}}
errors.SPRINT_STATUS_NOT_FOUND: Sprint status file doesn't exist yet. Run `bmad-sprint-planning` first.
errors.WORKFLOW_MAX_TURNS: Workflow stopped — too many turns without finishing. Try splitting it into smaller steps.
errors.PERSONA_NOT_FOUND: Persona `{{slug}}` isn't available in this project. The BMM module may not be installed.

dumpSkills.emptyState: No BMad skills detected. Run the installer first.

workflow.maxTurns: Workflow reached the maximum number of turns. Pick up from where it left off.

help.noNextRequired: No required action — you can move on or pick something from Recommended.
help.trackComplete: All phases done. Time for a retrospective!

kanban.retrospectiveDescription: Optional epic retrospective. Click Run to launch bmad-retrospective.

empty.backlog: No stories in backlog. Run sprint-planning to populate.
empty.ready-for-dev: Drop stories here when they're ready for development.
empty.in-progress: Drag a story here to mark it in progress.
empty.review: Stories awaiting code review land here.

kanban.storyFileMissing: No story file on disk yet. Run bmad-create-story to generate one.
